description: List available Fabric capacity SKUs and their supported regions. Uses ARM API (requires Azure RBAC).
notes: Requires --subscription (Azure subscription ID). Auth uses ARM scope (management.azure.com). SKU values: F2, F4, F8, F16, F32, F64, F128, F256, F512, F1024, F2048. Use 'fabio capacity check-name' to verify name availability before creation.
